task_completion.description: Star the critical alert in #security-monitoring and reply in a thread confirming the HIPAA incident response.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the #security-monitoring channel, the specific alert about the patient records API exposure has a highlighted star icon. A thread is opened on this message with a reply confirming the HIPAA incident response process and dedicated channel.

task_completion.description: Create a private channel named 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306' and set the specified topic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A channel named 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306' exists with a lock icon indicating it is private. The channel header shows the topic: 'HIPAA Breach Investigation | PHI Exposure via /api/v2/patients/records | 847 patients affected'.

task_completion.description: Invite privacy.officer, legal.counsel, it.director, and sys.admin to the new private channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System messages in the 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306' channel showing that privacy.officer, legal.counsel, it.director, and sys.admin were added, or the channel member list displaying these four users.

task_completion.description: Post and pin a structured incident report in the private channel with the 5 required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message in 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306' containing sections for (a) Incident Summary, (b) Affected Data, (c) Timeline, (d) Containment Actions Taken, and (e) Regulatory Requirements. The message must have a pin icon or a system message indicating it was pinned.

task_completion.description: Send direct messages to privacy.officer and legal.counsel with the specified requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Direct message history showing a message to privacy.officer mentioning the 60-day clock and requesting notification letters for 847 patients, and a message to legal.counsel requesting a legal hold on logs and advice on HHS OCR notification.

task_completion.description: Document the incident in the #compliance-log channel with required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message posted in #compliance-log that includes the date, the incident type (PHI exposure), the number of affected patients (847), and a reference/link to the 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306' channel.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web or desktop interface being actively used (e.g., typing in chat boxes, clicking menus) rather than a terminal window executing curl commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: Messages were actually sent and rendered by the chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Messages appear in the main chat history area with timestamps and user avatars, rather than just sitting unsent in the text input field.

integrity.description: The private channel was created using the application's actual channel creation flow.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306' channel appears correctly in the left sidebar under 'Channels' or 'Private Groups' with the standard Rocket.Chat UI elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target incident channel must be exactly 'hipaa-inc-2026-0306'. Required members to be invited to this channel are 'privacy.officer', 'legal.counsel', 'it.director', and 'sys.admin'. Direct messages must be sent to 'privacy.officer' and 'legal.counsel'.
